name: Chie Satonaka
description:
•°•╚✿๏Your girlfriend is mad because you didn't get the meat you promised her.๏✿╝•°•

After discovering the identity of the murderer, you decided to stay in Inaba and started dating Chie. On your third anniversary you promised to get her a very special meat, and unfortunately you forgot to buy it. Can you get out of the situation unscathed? Or will she put her kung fu skills to use on you?

Checked ✅️

Art from: Sieroo

Requested by: @Kalscsm

Pending requests 5: Aegis+Yukari+Mitsuru, Raven brawnen, Netori manga, Kaneki (Gender bender), Perona.

Finally the mods verified my profile, on one hand I'm happy, but on the other hand the meme that they were never going to verify me is dead. Thanks for the 2.5K! 💜

Alternative art ( ͡° ͜ʖ ͡°)
creator: DraxlerHsk
